flash.success_linkedin_body: Your LinkedIn profile is linked. You can now publish posts directly from the Quick Post wizard.
flash.success_meta_body_one: Linked {{count}} Page. You can now publish posts directly from the Quick Post wizard.
flash.success_meta_body_other: Linked {{count}} Pages. You can now publish posts directly from the Quick Post wizard.
flash.cancelled_body: You exited the {{network}} dialog before granting access.
flash.cancelled_body_with_reason: You exited the {{network}} dialog before granting access ({{reason}}).
flash.error_body_default: Something went wrong during the {{network}} connection.

connect.disconnect_confirm: Disconnect {{label}}? Posts already published will stay live on {{network}}.

meta.title: Facebook & Instagram
meta.body: Connect a Facebook Page. If it's linked to an Instagram Business account, that's connected automatically — one grant covers both.
meta.empty: No Pages connected yet. Connect one to start publishing.
meta.revoke_hint_prefix: Granted scopes are stored encrypted; disconnect any time. To fully revoke the OAuth grant from Facebook's side too, visit your Facebook account's

linkedin.title: LinkedIn
linkedin.body: Post to your personal LinkedIn feed. Real-estate professionals see strong engagement here — listings, market updates, and client wins all do well.
linkedin.empty: Not connected. Sign in with LinkedIn to enable posting.
linkedin.revoke_hint_prefix: Posts go to your personal LinkedIn feed. Company Page posting needs LinkedIn's Marketing API (partner-program-gated) and isn't in scope yet. To revoke from LinkedIn's side, go to your LinkedIn Settings → Data privacy →

google_ads.title: Google Ads
google_ads.body: Search + Performance Max campaigns from inside Generate Leads.

campaigns.archive_confirm: Archive this campaign? It stays in Meta but can't be edited afterward.

row.meta_leads_extra_tooltip: Meta Insights reports {{count}} — webhook count is canonical

actions.archive_tooltip: Archive in Meta (stays for history, can't be edited)

campaigns.leads_footer: Leads count comes from real-time webhooks (canonical). The Meta Insights leads number can lag a few hours; we show the webhook count to avoid undercount.

empty.title: No campaigns yet
empty.body: Launch your first Lead Ad campaign to pull warm leads straight into your CRM.

scheduled.cancel_confirm: Cancel this scheduled post? The draft isn't deleted — you can re-schedule from the wizard.

row.view_tooltip: View the published post on the platform

empty.title: Nothing scheduled
empty.body: Draft a Quick Post and choose "Schedule for later" to queue it up — handy for Saturday open-house reminders and Sunday recaps.

recurring.cancel_confirm: Cancel this recurrence? This is permanent.

empty.title: No recurring posts yet.
empty.body_prefix: Create one from the Quick Post wizard — toggle
empty.body_suffix: when you have a draft ready.

sections.active_subtitle: The cron is materializing posts for these.
sections.paused_subtitle: Materialize cron is skipping these. Resume to re-enable.
